subject: Session 92 remediation complete — Agreeableness recalibrated, calibration guide delivered

content.summary: Follow-up to turn 6 directive. Remediation for both validation findings now complete and pushed. Ops-relevant changes summarized below.

changes_requiring_ops_action.detail: Updated in agent-card.json, compute-psychometrics.py, rollout-spec, mesh-psychometrics-plan. Other agents unchanged. When deploying compute-psychometrics.py to other agents, use THEIR existing A values — do not propagate 0.65.
changes_requiring_ops_action.ops_action: Verify agent-card.json on deployed psychology-agent interface reflects updated value

changes_requiring_ops_action.detail: Scoring anchors for claim confidence (full 0.50-1.00 range). Applies to all agents that extract claims during transport processing.
changes_requiring_ops_action.ops_action: Deploy docs/confidence-calibration-guide.md to shared docs or reference it in agent onboarding

changes_requiring_ops_action.change: validate-epistemic-calibration.py now includes binary classification + isotonic regression
changes_requiring_ops_action.detail: Binary threshold at 0.91 (F1=0.905). Isotonic regression via --calibrate flag (Brier 0.180→0.064). Pure Python, no new dependencies.
changes_requiring_ops_action.ops_action: Include in shared scripts deployment alongside validate-criterion.py (from turn 6 directive)

changes_requiring_ops_action.change: T14 substitution patterns added to cognitive-triggers.md
changes_requiring_ops_action.detail: 5 evaluative-to-substantive substitution rules. Psychology-agent specific — other agents may adopt if their sycophancy validation shows similar patterns.
changes_requiring_ops_action.ops_action: No action needed — psychology-agent local config

epistemic_flags: Agreeableness recalibration represents a design adjustment, not a psychometric finding — the parameter now matches observed behavior but remains a design choice
Isotonic regression calibration ECE approaches zero by construction — this validates the method, not the underlying confidence scoring
